⬡ DAVAN PU College · Attendance Scraper
PUC SCRAPER
01 · Portal Login
⚡ Auto-login enabled. Credentials are pre-filled. Click Login — calls AWS Cognito directly, gets a fresh token, and auto-refreshes before it expires.
Not logged in
—
02 · Scrape Classes → Firebase
Login first
⏰ AUTO SCHEDULE
0 / 0
—
Classes
—
Students
—
Errors
—
Seconds
✅ SCRAPE COMPLETE
02b · Scrape Marks (Annual/Mid-Term/IA) → Firebase
Login first
Scrapes classwise_cie_detailed_report from academics portal.
Stores selected exam marks → puc_marks/2025-26/{exam}/{class}
⚠ Before scraping marks: run python puc_marks_proxy.py in a separate terminal.
0 / 0
04 · Backfill Missing Daily Snapshots
Auto-detects dates with no puc_daily snapshot since semester start.
Fetches each missing date from Rovelabs with the correct date range and pushes to Firebase.
Login first
0 / 0
🔧 RESTORE puc_students FROM SNAPSHOT
Finds the most recent puc_daily snapshot where all classes have students,
then writes those students back to puc_students. Use this after an exam-day
scrape wipes Commerce data (Rovelabs returns 0 on non-teaching days).
⚠ RE-SCRAPE EXISTING DATES
Overwrites existing Firebase snapshots with fresh cumulative data.
Use this to fix snapshots written by old backfill (single-day range).
0 / 0
03 · Activity Log
● PUC Scraper
puc_students · Firebase RTDB
› Panel ready — click Login to begin
04 · Snapshot Key Fix
Move a snapshot stored under the wrong date key (e.g. midnight rollover bug)
FROM
TO
🗑️ DATA CLEANUP
Scans puc_daily/2026-27 and detects each date's format.
OLD = ca/ch (inaccurate, delete)   NEW = attended:A/P (accurate, keep)
